# Lowe Coherence Lagrangian Dashboard

This dashboard displays the live results from the analysis of the Lowe Coherence Lagrangian.

---

## Run Analysis

Click the link below to run the analysis script. The results on this page will update automatically after the script finishes.

**Run Script:** [Execute Lagrangian Analysis](file:///D:/THEOPHYSICS_MASTER/00_VAULT_SYSTEM/Scripts/Data/Source/Theophysics_Assets/Scripts/run_lagrangian_analysis.bat)

---

## Results

```dataviewjs
// This script reads the JSON file generated by the analyze_lagrangian.py script.
const path = "Theophysics_Assets/Dashboards/lagrangian_results.json";

const content = await dv.io.load(path);

if (content) {
    const data = JSON.parse(content);

    dv.header(2, "Lagrangian Metrics");
    dv.paragraph(`**System Status:** ${data.system_status}`);
    dv.paragraph(`**Coherence Evolution Rate (χ̇):** ${data.coherence_evolution_rate}`);
    dv.paragraph(`**Entropy Gradient (S):** ${data.entropy_gradient}`);
    dv.paragraph(`**Last Run:** ${data.last_run}`);

} else {
    dv.paragraph("Could not load analysis results. Run the script to generate the data file.");
}
```
